name: ai_marketing_claude
description: An AI-powered marketing toolkit that leverages multiple parallel subagents to perform website audits, generate marketing copy, email sequences, ad campaigns, content calendars, competitive intelligence analyses, and create client-ready PDF marketing reports.

inputs.name: website_url
inputs.description: URL of the website to audit or analyze.

inputs.name: marketing_goals
inputs.description: Description of the marketing objectives or requirements.

inputs.name: target_audience
inputs.description: Description of the target market or customer segment.

inputs.name: existing_content
inputs.description: Current marketing copy or assets to be enhanced or referenced.

inputs.name: campaign_parameters
inputs.description: Details such as campaign type, duration, channels, budget, and tone.

outputs.name: website_audit_report
outputs.description: Comprehensive audit report outlining website strengths, weaknesses, and recommendations.

outputs.name: marketing_copy
outputs.description: Generated copy tailored for specified marketing channels like social media, ads, and emails.

outputs.name: email_sequence
outputs.description: Automated sequences of marketing emails designed to nurture leads or drive conversions.

outputs.name: ad_campaign_plan
outputs.description: Strategic ad campaign details including messaging and targeting.

outputs.name: content_calendar
outputs.description: Scheduled content plan outlining topics, formats, and publishing dates.

outputs.name: competitive_intelligence_report
outputs.description: Analysis of competitors’ marketing strategies and positioning.

outputs.name: client_ready_pdf
outputs.description: Consolidated marketing report formatted and ready for client presentation.

steps: Receive website URL and marketing goals as input
Deploy parallel subagents specialized in auditing, copywriting, email sequencing, ad campaign creation, content calendar planning, and competitor analysis
Analyze the input website and relevant data to produce detailed marketing insights
Generate content such as marketing copy, email sequences, and campaign plans using AI prompt templates
Synthesize outputs into structured content calendars and campaign strategies
Compile all results into professional PDF reports tailored for client delivery
Provide deliverables enabling marketers to execute data-driven campaigns
use_cases: Marketing agencies auditing client websites and generating comprehensive marketing plans
Small business owners seeking automated marketing content generation
Content strategists creating synchronized content calendars and email drip campaigns
Digital advertisers designing AI-powered ad campaigns based on competitive insights
Consultants preparing client-ready presentations with detailed marketing intelligence
patterns: Parallel processing using multiple specialized AI subagents
Template-based AI prompt engineering for marketing content generation
Sequential email campaign generation with contextual coherence
PDF report generation integrating various marketing outputs

prompt_templates.name: website_audit_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Audit the website at {website_url} and identify areas to improve marketing effectiveness including SEO, user engagement, and content quality.

prompt_templates.name: marketing_copy_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate persuasive marketing copy targeting {target_audience} focused on these goals: {marketing_goals}.

prompt_templates.name: email_sequence_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Create a sequence of {number_of_emails} marketing emails tailored for {target_audience} to achieve {campaign_goal}.

prompt_templates.name: ad_campaign_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Design an ad campaign including messaging and targeting parameters based on {campaign_parameters}.

prompt_templates.name: content_calendar_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Develop a monthly content calendar with posting dates, topics, and content types aligned with {marketing_goals}.

prompt_templates.name: competitive_intelligence_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Analyze key competitors within {industry} and summarize their marketing strategies and positioning.
